networkfirewall.rulegroup.ipset.CfnAbout: A list of IP addresses and address ranges, in CIDR notation. This is part of a [AWS::NetworkFirewall::RuleGroup RuleVariables](aws-properties-networkfirewall-rulegroup-rulevariables.md).
